creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Gerard,

There is no news here basically.

However, can you try installing the latest 11 release.

Then checkout sources for FreeBSD 12-stable.

Then do two experiments:

a) Apply the PCI debug patch to an 11-stable kernel. Reboot. Is any output produced?

b) Apply the PCI debug patch to an 12-stable kernel. Reboot. Is any output produced?

I have a suspicion something in ACPI is using input from an invalid PCI register and writing to a valid one.

--HPS
